professionalSummary.text: Project Leader with 10+ years across the SDLC, leading cross-functional squads at Mercado Libre for systems handling 20,000+ RPM — expert in Agile leadership, stakeholder alignment, and delivery management.

Built a custom debugging engine that reduced incident backlog by 70% and cut RCA time from ~2 hours to ~30 minutes; automated operational workflows with n8n + AI, recovering ~18–20 hours/week of engineering capacity.

Mentored squads of up to 9 engineers, driving 4 promotions in 18 months, while owning end-to-end delivery of complex cross-functional programs that required negotiating foundational architectural changes.

coreCompetencies.title: Technical Program & Delivery Management
coreCompetencies.description: 5+ years owning end-to-end delivery of cross-functional technical programs, defining roadmaps, milestones, and success criteria aligned with multi-quarter business objectives. Skilled at breaking down epics into technical stories, managing dependencies, and driving execution across UX, Product, Commercial, and Architecture teams.

coreCompetencies.title: Agile Leadership & Process Optimization
coreCompetencies.description: 3+ years as Scrum Master driving sprint planning, quarterly roadmap alignment, and Agile ceremonies for engineering squads up to 9 members. Modernized operating models through Jira workflow restructuring and AI-enabled automation, eliminating administrative bottlenecks and improving delivery velocity.

coreCompetencies.title: Systems Engineering & Automation
coreCompetencies.description: Strong systems thinking applied to high-scale architectures (20,000+ RPM). Designed and deployed a Shadow Processing & Debugging Engine for incident management at scale. Implemented n8n and AI-powered workflows to automate scheduling, ticket creation, documentation, and sprint planning.

coreCompetencies.title: Team Development & Mentorship
coreCompetencies.description: Mentored 9 engineers across skill levels, facilitating technical decision-making, enforcing code quality standards, and driving career growth — resulting in 4 promotions (Jr to SSR, SSR to Sr, Sr to TL). Built a positive team culture focused on continuous improvement and ownership.

professionalExperience.description: Led a cross-functional squad of 9 (7 Developers, 2 Technical Leaders) responsible for critical Marketplace APIs with traffic peaks exceeding 20,000+ RPM.

achievements.text: Owned end-to-end delivery of the 'Product Bundles' technical program — a complex initiative enabling sellers to combine inventory at scale. Defined milestones, success criteria, and multi-quarter roadmap; orchestrated cross-functional alignment across UX, Product, Commercial, and Core Architecture teams, negotiating modifications to foundational inventory entities and managing dependencies across 3 backend systems (Inventory, Catalog, Checkout).

metrics.value: [NEEDS METRIC: number of sellers impacted or revenue increase from Product Bundles]

achievements.text: Architected and deployed a custom Shadow Processing & Debugging Engine for a high-frequency event pipeline handling 20,000+ RPM. Built a data-driven business case that overcame initial scope resistance; the engine enabled real-time traffic inspection without blocking production, reducing incident backlog by 70% and cutting RCA time from ~2 hours to ~30 minutes.

Overhauled squad operating model by acting as Scrum Master, restructuring Jira workflows, and implementing n8n + AI copilots to automate sprint planning, epic/story/task creation, ticket sizing, scheduling, and documentation. Recovered ~18–20 hours/week of engineering capacity (~2h/dev + 4h leadership), improving forecasting accuracy and delivery velocity.

Mentored 9 engineers across skill levels, facilitating architectural decisions for high-traffic solutions, driving code quality best practices, and protecting the team from scope creep through strict roadmap prioritization. Drove 4 promotions in 18 months (Jr to SSR, SSR to Sr, Sr to TL), building team capacity and fostering a culture of ownership.

Designed and implemented scalable Java backend services for high-traffic Marketplace components, optimizing performance under peak loads exceeding 20,000+ RPM. Applied SOLID principles and REST API best practices to build maintainable, testable service layers.
Transformed CI/CD and Git workflows, reducing deployment friction and improving code quality gates, enabling faster and more reliable continuous delivery across the engineering organization.

metrics.value: [NEEDS METRIC: deployment frequency before vs after, or reduction in deployment time]

achievements.text: Mentored Junior and Semi-Senior developers through structured code reviews and pair programming, accelerating their path to independent contributors and building a pipeline for technical leadership.

metrics.value: [NEEDS METRIC: number of developers mentored or promotions achieved]

achievements.text: Maintained and evolved internal Java core components for the Marketplace ecosystem, ensuring 99.9% uptime during traffic spikes and implementing caching strategies and circuit breakers for high-concurrency stability.

Reviewed 8–12 pull requests per week across a squad of 9, applying quality standards and identifying architectural risks before deployment. Led production incident resolution and implemented preventive measures to reduce recurrence.

Led functional analysis and backlog refinement sessions, translating product requirements into technical specifications and RESTful endpoint designs with OAuth authentication. Documented integration patterns for cross-team consumption.

achievements.text: Developed and maintained internal Java microservices and REST APIs, enforcing strict coding standards and SOLID OOP principles that reduced technical debt and improved system reliability across critical services.
